name: Caged Fury
effect:
• -6% additional Attack Speed (multiplies) for every 1 time(s) you cast an Attack Mobility Skill in the last 2s

name: Comradeship
effect:
• Minions gain the Belt's bonuses
  • -10% additional Minion Damage

name: Divine Grace
effect:
• Gains 1 stack(s) of a random Blessing every second. Interval: 1s
  • +1% additional damage per stack of Blessing, up to 10%
  • -1% additional damage taken per stack of Blessing, up to 10%

name: Hallowed Journey
effect: • Triggers Lv. 40 Blurry Steps, Secret Origin Unleash, and Arcane Circle after consuming a total of 5000 Mana. Interval: 2s

effect:

name: Affliction
effect:
